story.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation

draft:
I'm keeping a close eye on the recent security incident at OpenAI and Hugging Face. 
Their model evaluation process was compromised, highlighting the risks of open-source collaboration. 
Key takeaways include:
* Unintended access to sensitive data
* Importance of secure testing environments
What measures can we take to prevent similar incidents in AI development? 
#AIsecurity #OpenAI #HuggingFace
